originalTitle: Apple’s newest iPad Air is up to $100 off for the first time
summary: If you want an iPad that’s more powerful than the entry-level model but less expensive than the iPad Pro, the latest iPad Air is the one to buy, and it’s down to one its best prices to date. The 11-inch Air with 128GB of storage and Wi-Fi connectivity is available at Amazon starting at $519.99 […]
content: If you want an iPad that’s more powerful than the entry-level model but less expensive than the iPad Pro, the latest iPad Air is the one to buy, and it’s down to one its best prices to date. The 11-inch Air with 128GB of storage and Wi-Fi connectivity is available at Amazon starting at $519.99 ($79 off). If you want a larger screen, the base 13-inch Air has dropped to a new low price of $699 ($100 off), also at Amazon. [Product: 13-inch iPad Air M4 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GQVDGCD2/?tag=theverge02-20, https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GQVJJZ2M/?tag=theverge02-20, https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GQVMGWHQ/?tag=theverge02-20] [Product: 11-inch iPad Air (2026) | https://www.amazon.com/Apple-iPad-Air-11-inch-M4/dp/B0GQVPX1PJ/?tag=theverge02-20, https://www.amazon.com/Apple-iPad-Air-11-inch-M4/dp/B0GQVF4SV7/?tag=theverge02-20, https://www.amazon.com/Apple-iPad-Air-11-inch-M4/dp/B0GQVQZH19/?tag=theverge02-20] No matter which size you choose, the new iPad Air is noticeably faster than the base iPad thanks to its M4 processor and a bump up to 12GB of RAM. While it falls short of the M5-powered iPad Pros in terms of raw performance and its super-thin design, the Air is sufficient for lighter creative work and some gaming. This model also boasts Apple Intelligence and support for the latest Apple Pencil Pro.  Apple also made a handful of smaller upgrades in the now-discounted iPad Air, like the N1 wireless networking chip that supports Wi-Fi 7 and Bluetooth 6. It’s also compatible with Thread, making it easier to control smart lights, locks, and other compatible smart home devices directly from your tablet. It was already a good value, and now it’s a better one at this price if you’re shopping for a new iPad. Read our M4-powered iPad Air review.
chineseTitle: Apple 最新款 iPad Air 首次最高降价 100 美元
chineseSummary: 如果你想要一台比入门级机型更强大但比 iPad Pro 更便宜的 iPad，那么最新的 iPad Air 就是你的最佳选择，而且它的价格已降至迄今为止最优惠的价格之一。具有 128GB 存储空间和 Wi-Fi 连接的 11 英寸 Air 在亚马逊有售，起价 519.99 美元 [...]
chineseContent: 如果你想要一台比入门级机型更强大但比 iPad Pro 更便宜的 iPad，那么最新的 iPad Air 就是你的最佳选择，而且它的价格已降至迄今为止最优惠的价格之一。具有 128GB 存储空间和 Wi-Fi 连接的 11 英寸 Air 在亚马逊有售，起价 519.99 美元（折扣 79 美元）。如果你想要更大的屏幕，基础款 13 英寸 Air 已降至新低价 699 美元（立减 100 美元），亚马逊也有售。 【产品：13英寸iPad Air M4 | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GQVDGCD2/?tag=theverge02-20、https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GQVJJZ2M/?tag=theverge02-20、https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0GQVMGWHQ/?tag=theverge02-20] [产品：11 英寸 iPad Air (2026) | https://www.amazon.com/Apple-iPad-Air-11-inch-M4/dp/B0GQVPX1PJ/?tag=theverge02-20，https://www.amazon.com/Apple-iPad-Air-11-inch-M4/dp/B0GQVF4SV7/?tag=theverge02-20， https://www.amazon.com/Apple-iPad-Air-11-inch-M4/dp/B0GQVQZH19/?tag=theverge02-20] 无论您选择哪种尺寸，由于配备 M4 处理器和高达 12GB 的 RAM，新款 iPad Air 的速度明显比基础版 iPad 快。虽然它在原始性能和超薄设计方面不如配备 M5 的 iPad Pro，但 Air 足以满足轻松的创意工作和一些游戏的需求。该型号还拥有 Apple Intelligence 功能并支持最新的 Apple Pencil Pro。  苹果还在现已打折的 iPad Air 中进行了一些较小的升级，例如支持 Wi-Fi 7 和蓝牙 6 的 N1 无线网络芯片。它还与 Thread 兼容，可以更轻松地直接从平板电脑控制智能灯、锁和其他兼容的智能家居设备。它本来就很超值，现在如果你要购买一台新 iPad，这个价格它会更划算。阅读我们由 M4 驱动的 iPad Air 评测。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
